description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a matte black finish, featuring a large round headlamp at the front and wide, swept-back handlebars equipped with rearview mirrors. The body is robust, with a prominent fuel tank, a single padded seat, and a rear fender that covers the back wheel. The engine is exposed, showing metallic and ribbed details, and the exhaust pipes run along the side, adding to its vintage aesthetic. The wheels are thick and solid, with visible spokes and a sturdy frame connecting the front and rear. There are saddlebags mounted on either side of the rear wheel, suggesting utility for carrying small items. The rear includes a visible license plate, taillight, and indicators, completing the urban-ready look.
description: A matte black, classic-style motorcycle with wide handlebars, a single seat, exposed engine, and saddlebags, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlamp, wide handlebars with mirrors, and the front tire.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fuel tank, single seat, exposed engine, and saddlebags.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate, rear fender, and both saddlebags.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipes, engine details, and the overall frame structure.
